# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_CANDLESTICK_QUALITY_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** filter_change
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Adding a candlestick quality gate to SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK entries will reduce false triggers caused by retest-wick stops, improving win rate and edge capture on J anchor days. Design 6 from SNIPER_ENTRY_DESIGNS (zero new code) filters entries based on candlestick structure (e.g., strong close in direction of trade, minimal opposite wick) to avoid entering on weak retests that immediately reverse.

## Mechanism

SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK entry remains unchanged (break of ★★+ level with VIX>=18 and VIX>5d_avg). Before issuing an entry signal, check the triggering 5m bar's candlestick:
- For bear entries (puts): require close <= open + 0.1*(high-low) (strong close near low, minimal upper wick)
- For bull entries (calls): require close >= high - 0.1*(high-low) (strong close near high, minimal lower wick)
If condition fails, skip entry. No new code needed—uses existing OHLCV data in heartbeat.md.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (based on SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK entry premium ~$1.00)
2. **Sample bias:** Using 16-month SPY 5m data (Jan 2025-May 2026); SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK entry frequency unknown—risk of overfit if few samples; selection method: all bars meeting VIX>=18 and VIX>5d_avg
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward held-out window not performed)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J anchor days not validated with realistic OPRA simulation)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: missed entry on strong break due to candlestick filter (e.g., gap bar with weak close)
   - Max drawdown: consecutive losses if filter fails to adapt to regime (e.g., trending days with imperfect candles)
   - Blow-up scenario: persistent regime where all breakouts have retest wicks (e.g., low-vol chop) causing zero entries and missed winners
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (top-5 days % of P&L not computed)

## Pre-merge gate

<what tests need to pass: gym validators, walk-forward, real-fills>
- Gym validators: 70/70 PASS (no new indicators, uses existing OHLCV)
- Walk-forward: OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >=0.50 on 16-month data (requires Stage-1 backtest)
- Real-fills: N>=10 OPRA cases on top 3 J days with chart-stop-only, WR>=60% (requires Stage-1 backtest)
- J Rule 9: 3+ live SNIPER shadow trades in journal/sniper-shadow-trades.jsonl (independent of this candidate)

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- no backtest performed; hypothesis based on design doc rationale only. High risk of overfit if candlestick gate is too restrictive or misaligned with SNIPER breakout mechanics.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

<does this conflict with / complement candidates 1-9 in _LEADERBOARD.md?>
Complements SNIPER_VIX_TREND_STAGE2_ENTRY_SWEEP (#15) and SNIPER_VIX_TREND_OOS_CONFIRMED (#14) by adding quality filter to their entry conditions. No conflict with non-SNIPER candidates (e.g., ORB gates, V14E gates). May reduce overlap with BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON if both fire on same bar—requires coordination testing. Does not affect watcher-only candidates (ranks 3-5, 8-11). SNIPER-specific; no impact on bull setups (ranks 8-9, 18-19).
